ApprovalProcess.label: Service Order Discount Approval
ApprovalProcess.description: Routes a Service Order for sales-leadership sign-off when any of its line items carries a discount above 20%. Submitted automatically by the Service_Order_Discount_Approval_Router flow; entry criteria are also defined here as a second line of defense in case a record is ever submitted directly. Approval goes to the Sales Leadership queue rather than a user-picked approver -- adhoc/role approver selection is incompatible with this process's page exposure.

approvalStep.name: Sales_Leadership_Review
approvalStep.label: Sales Leadership Review
approvalStep.description: The Sales Leadership queue reviews the discount and approves or rejects the order.
